prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含原理科农学批次）最低位次约 6885→163（普通批）→4494→3219→2576，剔除 2022 年普通批次异常值后，农学批次位次呈持续前移趋势（6885→4494→3219→2576），近 3 年累计前移约 3900 名，竞争逐年加剧；该校在广西物理类招生计划：2021 年 44 人，2022 年 40 人，2023 年 40 人，2024 年 41 人，2025 年 43 人，2026 年增至 46 人，较 2025 年扩招 3 人（约 7%），扩招幅度中等。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科排名第 3，属全国顶尖高校，对物理类高分考生吸引力极强；2026 年声誉偏负面（学术不端、校园安全等），但顶尖名校抗舆情能力强；抖音热度排名第 14（高热），综合关注度维持高位；计算机科学与技术 A+、软件工程 A+、控制科学与工程 A+、光学工程 A+、机械工程 A+、电气工程 A 等，与物理类招生专业高度匹配，学科实力顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业对应计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程（高热推荐）等 热门方向，专业热度持续升温；广西 2026 年物理类考生约 26.9 万（按近年占比估算），较 2025 年 26.0 万增加约 3.3%，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近 3 年位次持续前移的强劲势头、2026 年物理类扩招 7% 的中等利好、考生数增加 3.3% 以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热，预计 2026 年物理类录取位次在前移趋势基础上略有前移（数字减小、更难进），扩招部分抵消了竞争加剧的影响但不足以逆转趋势；预测最低位次约 2634 名，区间 2318–2950 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including original Science Agriculture batch) was approximately 6885→163 (regular batch)→4494→3219→2576. Excluding the 2022 regular batch anomaly, the Agriculture batch ranking shows a continuous forward trend (6885→4494→3219→2576), with a cumulative forward shift of about 3900 places in the last 3 years, indicating intensifying competition year by year. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi: 44 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 43 in 2025, and increasing to 46 in 2026, an expansion of 3 places (about 7%) compared to 2025, which is a moderate expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 3rd in the Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the top national universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring Physics Category candidates. In 2026, the reputation is slightly negative (academic misconduct, campus safety, etc.), but top prestigious universities have strong resistance to public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 14th (high heat), with overall attention remaining high. Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A, etc., highly match the Physics Category enrollment majors, with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors correspond to Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering (highly recommended), and other popular directions, with major popularity continuously rising. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangxi is approximately 269,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), an increase of about 3.3% compared to 260,000 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong momentum of continuous forward ranking shifts in the last 3 years, the moderate positive factor of a 7% expansion in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, a 3.3% increase in candidate numbers, and the sustained high popularity of Computer Science/Electronic Information and other hot majors, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will slightly shift forward (smaller number, harder to enter) based on the forward trend. The expansion partially offsets the impact of intensified competition but is insufficient to reverse the trend. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2634, with a range of 2318–2950.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 2318–2950, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Information/Electronic Information/Future Technology classes as the main direction, with Tier 1 Turing/Mixed/Computer classes as a stretch, and Tier 3 Applied Biological Science classes as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than 2318, focus on impacting Chu Kochen Honors College classes and Computer Science.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类（含原文科）最低位次约 87→87→99→87→118，近 5 年整体波动不大，但 2025 年明显后移至 118 名，较前 4 年平均值后移约 30 名，反映竞争有所缓和；该校在广西历史类招生计划：2021–2022 年 6 人，2023–2025 年 7 人，2026 年增至 8 人，较 2025 年扩招 1 人（约 14.3%），扩招幅度较大，有助于进一步降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第 3 名，属全国顶尖高校，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（涉及学术不端、校园安全等事件），但作为顶尖名校，负面舆情对报考热度的实际冲击有限；抖音热度排名第 14（高热），短视频曝光量高，整体关注度维持高位；拥有计算机科学与技术 A+、软件工程 A+、控制科学与工程 A+、光学工程 A+、临床医学 A、法学 A 等大量 A 类学科，学科实力全面顶尖，对考生吸引力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业（社会科学试验班、法学、人文科学试验班）对应法学、经济学等大类，2026 年法学热度分化观望、金融/财经/经济分化观望，整体热度中性偏稳；广西 2026 年高考总人数约 39.2 万，较 2025 年（约 38 万）小幅增加，历史类考生数相应略有上升，竞争微幅加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次后移趋势、2026 年历史类扩招 14.3% 的显著利好以及考生数小幅增加，预计 2026 年历史类录取位次继续后移（数字增大、更易进），但浙大顶尖地位和持续高热关注度限制了后移幅度；预测最低位次约 133 名，区间 117–149 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 87→87→99→87→118. Over the past 5 years, overall fluctuations have been small, but in 2025, it significantly shifted back to 118th place, about 30 places behind the average of the previous 4 years, reflecting eased competition. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi: 6 students in 2021–2022, 7 students in 2023–2025, and increased to 8 students in 2026, an expansion of 1 student (about 14.3%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large increase and helps further lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 3rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, making it a top-tier national university with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving incidents such as academic misconduct and campus safety), but as a top prestigious university, the actual impact of negative public opinion on application popularity is limited. Its Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with high short video exposure, maintaining overall high attention. It has a large number of A-class disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Clinical Medicine A, and Law A, with comprehensive and top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category enrollment majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Law, Humanities Experimental Class) correspond to major categories like Law and Economics. In 2026, Law popularity shows divided observation, Finance/Economics/Economy shows divided observation, with overall popularity neutral to stable. The total number of Guangxi Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 392,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 380,000), with a corresponding slight rise in History Category candidates, leading to a minor intensification of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of ranking shift back in 2025, the significant positive factor of a 14.3% expansion in History Category in 2026, and a slight increase in candidate numbers, it is expected that the admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to shift back (number increases, easier to enter), but Zhejiang University's top status and sustained high attention limit the extent of the shift. The predicted minimum ranking is about 133rd, with a range of 117–149.

- Law.

If your ranking is significantly better than 117, you can focus on aiming for the Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Science Experimental Class.
